name: feedbackmonk-widget
description: Embeddable feedbackmonk widget (vanilla JS+CSS, <30KB, CSP-safe, no third-party trackers).

scripts.minify: terser dist/widget.js -m -c passes=2,drop_console=true --module -o dist/widget.js && terser dist/redact.js -m -c passes=2,drop_console=true --module -o dist/redact.js
